meta.source: BPMN 2.0 Tier-1 swimlane elements from draw.io's mxgraph.bpmn stencil family. Canonical monochrome (white fill, neutral stroke); red accent for blocker events (error/cancel/terminate). Plain Task and collapsed Sub-process are composed (rounded rect) in src/bpmn.mjs — no stencil. Rebuild: hand-curated.
